ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist who performed the song */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album the song belongs to */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the song was released */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the song contains explicit content */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been liked */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been downloaded */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the song */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country or region of origin for the genre */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the genre */,
  "influence_score" REAL /* Influence score of the genre on other genres */,
  "related_genres" TEXT /* JSON array of related genre IDs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classification_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the classification model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of classification model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the classification model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON object containing model parameters */,
  "training_data_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training data set used to train the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classification_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification result */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being classified */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification model used */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predicted genre */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the classification result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the classification was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the classification result was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the classification (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classification_results_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classification_results_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classification_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES classification_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is an admin */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the system */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being interacted with */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre being interacted with */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the user (e.g., correct, incorrect) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interaction occurred */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interaction was last updated */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., play, like, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genre_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre characteristic */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre being characterized */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic (e.g., tempo, rhythm) */,
  "characteristic_value" TEXT /* Value of the characteristic (e.g., fast, slow) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the characteristic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the characteristic was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the characteristic information (e.g., expert, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genre_characteristics_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)
